mapper.select:
SELECT t.test_id AS "testId", t.version_id AS "versionId", pv.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", pv.version_name AS "versionName", t.title AS "title", t.priority_code AS "priorityCode", priority.note AS "priorityName", t.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", test_type.note AS "testTypeName", t.status_code AS "statusCode", status.note AS "statusName", t.assignee_id AS "assigneeId", assignee.user_name AS "assigneeName", assignee.login_id AS "assigneeLoginId", t.created_by AS "createdBy", creator.user_name AS "createdByName", creator.login_id AS "createdByLoginId", t.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(t.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(t.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt", t.team_name AS "teamName",
NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) AS "totalCaseCount", NVL(ex_count.execution_count, 0) AS "executionCount", NVL(ex_count.success_count, 0) AS "successCount", NVL(ex_count.fail_count, 0) AS "failCount", NVL(ex_count.hold_count, 0) AS "holdCount", NVL(ex_count.progress_count, 0) AS "progressCount",
CASE WHEN NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((NVL(ex_count.execution_count, 0) / tc_count.total_case_count) * 100) END AS "progressRate"
FROM test t JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id
LEFT JOIN common_code status ON t.status_code = status.code_id AND status.code_name = '0A'
LEFT JOIN common_code priority ON t.priority_code = priority.code_id AND priority.code_name = '0C'
LEFT JOIN common_code test_type ON t.test_type_code = test_type.code_id AND test_type.code_name = '0D'
LEFT JOIN users assignee ON t.assignee_id = assignee.user_id
LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT test_id, COUNT(*) AS total_case_count FROM test_case_mapping GROUP BY test_id ) tc_count ON t.test_id = tc_count.test_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tcm.test_id, COUNT(te.execution_id) AS execution_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a003' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a004' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a005' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hold_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a002' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress_count FROM test_case_mapping tcm LEFT JOIN test_execution te ON tcm.mapping_id = te.mapping_id GROUP BY tcm.test_id ) ex_count ON t.test_id = ex_count.test_id
WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} AND p.owner_id = #{loginUserId}
AND p.project_name LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
AND pv.version_name LIKE '%' || #{versionName} || '%'
AND t.team_name LIKE '%' || #{teamName} || '%'
AND t.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND t.status_code = #{statusCode}
AND t.test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}
AND t.priority_code = #{priorityCode}
AND assignee.user_name LIKE '%' || #{assigneeName} || '%'
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.test_id DESC

SELECT t.test_id AS "testId", t.version_id AS "versionId", pv.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName", pv.version_name AS "versionName", t.title AS "title", t.priority_code AS "priorityCode", priority.note AS "priorityName", t.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", test_type.note AS "testTypeName", t.status_code AS "statusCode", status.note AS "statusName", t.assignee_id AS "assigneeId", assignee.user_name AS "assigneeName", assignee.login_id AS "assigneeLoginId", t.created_by AS "createdBy", creator.user_name AS "createdByName", creator.login_id AS "createdByLoginId", t.description AS "description", TO_CHAR(t.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "startDate", TO_CHAR(t.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(t.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(t.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt", t.team_name AS "teamName",
NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) AS "totalCaseCount", NVL(ex_count.execution_count, 0) AS "executionCount", NVL(ex_count.success_count, 0) AS "successCount", NVL(ex_count.fail_count, 0) AS "failCount", NVL(ex_count.hold_count, 0) AS "holdCount", NVL(ex_count.progress_count, 0) AS "progressCount",
CASE WHEN NVL(tc_count.total_case_count, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((NVL(ex_count.execution_count, 0) / tc_count.total_case_count) * 100) END AS "progressRate"
FROM test t JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id
LEFT JOIN common_code status ON t.status_code = status.code_id AND status.code_name = '0A'
LEFT JOIN common_code priority ON t.priority_code = priority.code_id AND priority.code_name = '0C'
LEFT JOIN common_code test_type ON t.test_type_code = test_type.code_id AND test_type.code_name = '0D'
LEFT JOIN users assignee ON t.assignee_id = assignee.user_id
LEFT JOIN users creator ON t.created_by = creator.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT test_id, COUNT(*) AS total_case_count FROM test_case_mapping GROUP BY test_id ) tc_count ON t.test_id = tc_count.test_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tcm.test_id, COUNT(te.execution_id) AS execution_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a003' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a004' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a005' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hold_count, SUM(CASE WHEN te.result_status_code = 'a002' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS progress_count FROM test_case_mapping tcm LEFT JOIN test_execution te ON tcm.mapping_id = te.mapping_id GROUP BY tcm.test_id ) ex_count ON t.test_id = ex_count.test_id
WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
AND p.project_name LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
AND pv.version_name LIKE '%' || #{versionName} || '%'
AND t.team_name LIKE '%' || #{teamName} || '%'
AND t.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
AND t.status_code = #{statusCode}
AND t.test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}
AND t.priority_code = #{priorityCode}
AND assignee.user_name LIKE '%' || #{assigneeName} || '%'
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.test_id DESC

SELECT pv.version_id AS "versionId", pv.project_id AS "projectId", pv.version_name AS "versionName" FROM project_version pv WHERE pv.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pv.default_yn DESC, pv.created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName" FROM project_member pm JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY u.user_name ASC, u.login_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT pg.project_group_id AS "groupId", pg.group_name AS "groupName" FROM project_member pm JOIN project_group pg ON pm.project_group_id = pg.project_group_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} AND pm.project_group_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pg.group_name ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TEST_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_id, -4))) + 1 FROM test WHERE test_id LIKE 'TEST_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 1), 4, '0' ) FROM dual
INSERT INTO test ( test_id, version_id, title, priority_code, test_type_code, status_code, assignee_id, description, start_date, end_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at, team_name ) VALUES ( #{testId}, #{versionId}, #{title}, #{priorityCode}, #{testTypeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{assigneeId}, #{description}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{createdBy}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{teamName} )

INSERT INTO test_case_mapping ( mapping_id, test_id, test_case_id, sort_order )
SELECT 'TCM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(mapping_id, -4))) FROM test_case_mapping WHERE mapping_id LIKE 'TCM_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 0) + #{index} + 1, 4, '0' ) AS mapping_id, #{testId} AS test_id, #{testCaseId} AS test_case_id, #{index} + 1 AS sort_order FROM dual
